title: Neviti Let It Snow Snowman Glass Decoration, Multi-Colour, Pack of 10
features: Add an extra element of fun to your Christmas table
Co-ordinates with both the 'Let it Snow' Father Christmas and Snowman ranges
Perfect for family buffets and other celebrations
Colourful design that can be mixed and matched with other festive decorations
description: Product Description A pack of 10 glass decorations, featuring a cheerful snowman with festive robin friend. These cheerful decorations enhance your table decorations and are unusual way to add an element of fun to your table settings. Use alone or mix and match with other pieces in the ‘let it snow’ range. Box Contains 10 x Glass Decoration - Snowman
